Creating a Freedom Lifestyle Our journey with Enagic
Our Story

Hi, we're Stew & Jo

We're a family who decided that life was too short to live on repeat. So we did something a little wild — we sold everything, left the UK, and swapped the everyday grind for full-time travel, adventure, and freedom.

"This wasn't just about seeing the world. It was about reclaiming our life — our time, our energy, and the moments with our kids we knew we could never get back."

Jo's Story

Jo spent years in the 9–5 grind which left her feeling drained, uninspired, and constantly on the edge of burnout. Tired of trading time for money, missing out on quality moments with family, and juggling the never-ending demands of motherhood and full-time work.

Stew's Story

Stew overcame a cancer diagnosis in 2018, and since then has been committed to rebuilding his health from the inside out. This journey led him to a more natural, intentional approach to both physical and mental wellbeing.

Why Enagic?

After discovering Kangen Water as part of Stew's recovery, we fell in love with the products and the community. We only promote things we genuinely use and believe in — and Enagic ticked every box.

What We Promote

Products we use every day

Every product we share is one we personally use in our home and on our travels. We wouldn't put our name to anything less.

01 💧

K8 Water Ionizer

Flagship Product

A revolutionary device that transforms ordinary tap water into alkaline, antioxidant-rich, and hydrogen-rich drinking water. This unique water hydrates, balances the body's pH levels, detoxifies, and promotes overall wellness.

  • Improved digestion & enhanced energy levels
  • Better absorption of nutrients
  • Supports the body's natural detoxification
  • Contributes to healthier skin
  • Versatile: drinking, cooking, cleaning, beauty care
  • 68+ documented uses

02 🚿

Anespa Shower Filter

Home Spa

An in-home spa experience shower attachment. Remineralises water through an active charcoal ceramic filter while removing chlorine and bacteria — to protect your family's skin and hair every single day.

03 🛡️

Emguarde Environmental Harmoniser

EMF Protection

Your environment harmoniser. Targeting high-frequency electromagnetic noise radiation up to 1 GHz — defending your family and loved ones against invisible electromagnetic disturbances in the modern home.

04 🌿

Ukon Turmeric

Supplement

Wild turmeric sourced from Enagic's own farm in Okinawa, Japan. A powerful, natural anti-inflammatory supplement — one of the most studied plants in the world for its health benefits. Pure, traceable, and unlike anything you'll find on a supermarket shelf.

The Opportunity

Build a life on your terms

Enagic isn't just about great products — it's a genuine business opportunity that can create real financial and time freedom. When you purchase an Enagic product, you have the option to become a distributor for life — no extra fees, no hidden costs. One purchase = lifetime distribution rights and the potential to earn thousands of $ per sale.

Three key reasons to jump on-board

Products You Believe In

Promote high-class, life-changing products that you can put your full faith and trust in. When you believe in what you sell, it shows.

Supportive Community

Become part of a community of passionate entrepreneurs who will help and support you to achieve your goals and dreams every step of the way.

Location & Time Freedom

Build a business that supports you to live wherever you want, whenever you want. We run ours from our laptops as we travel the world.
